emails.subject: FW: Request for electricity proposal
emails.body: Don, Attached is a request for a gas proposal for a retail customer in California. Now that Roger Ponce is gone, and I am unable to get in touch with Derick Kelley, I no longer have a contact at EES to send these potential customers to. Can you tell me who is handling retail customers in the West, particularly California? Thanks, Kim Ward Manager West Gas Origination To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Request for electricity proposal
emails.body: RE: Request for electricity proposal The new Roger Ponce is David Hensel extension 3-5106
